title: NR27 0LN, ECD Poultry Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/QP3325LS/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:    Operator name: ECD Poultry Limited   Installation name: Hungry Hill Poultry Farm   Permit number: EPR/QP3325LS/A001   "
